note: The issuer PUBLIC key the 5 vendored sdjwtvc_examples.txt SD-JWT VC examples (ES256) are signed under. Extracted (x,y ONLY -- the private component 'd' is intentionally NOT vendored here, it is not needed for verification and this file is meant to stay a minimal, verification-only fixture) from oauth-wg/oauth-sd-jwt-vc's examples/settings.yml key_settings.issuer_key at the SAME pinned commit sdjwtvc_examples.txt was vendored from (see PROVENANCE.json). Independently re-verified before vendoring: all 5 sdjwtvc_examples.txt ES256 issuer signatures cryptographically verify under this exact key via proofbundle.sdjwt.verify_sd_jwt (tests/test_sdjwtvc_external_vectors.py) -- proves the x/y transcription is byte-correct, not merely copied.
